title: An automation triggered by an item name change that might reflect the change in a connected board or column
excerpt:

posts.author: YesTomSzymanski (Tom Szymanski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!!

I have some connected boards that share a lot of information. Unfortunately, one of the key bits of information that can change is the title of an item. Can we please see an automation that allows item name changes to both be a trigger and allow for a mirrored change in a connected item or column on a different board?

posts.author: mdalzell (Meredith Dalzell)
posts.cookedHtml: I could really use this type of automation!

posts.author: YSteinberg (Yoel S)
posts.cookedHtml:
had same issue, i realized this can be done in workflows.
